tools.name: calc
tools.description: Evaluate a mathematical expression with precise arithmetic. Supports +, -, *, /, **, %, parentheses, and common functions (sqrt, abs, ceil, floor, round, sin, cos, tan, log, log2, log10, exp, min, max, PI, E).

expression.description: Math expression to evaluate, e.g. '(3.14 * 2) + sqrt(16)'

tools.name: statistics
tools.description: Calculate statistics for a set of numbers: mean, median, mode, min, max, range, standard deviation, variance, sum, count.

tools.name: percentage
tools.description: Percentage calculations: find percentage of a number, find what percentage A is of B, or find percentage change between two values.

operation.description: of: X% of Y. is_what_percent: X is what % of Y. change: % change from X to Y.

tools.name: base_convert
tools.description: Convert a number between bases (binary, octal, decimal, hex, or any base 2-36).

tools.name: unit_convert
tools.description: Convert between common units: length (mm/cm/m/km/in/ft/yd/mi), weight (mg/g/kg/oz/lb), temperature (C/F/K), data (B/KB/MB/GB/TB), time (ms/s/min/hr/day).

tools.name: compound_interest
tools.description: Calculate compound interest. Returns final amount, total interest earned, and period-by-period breakdown.

rate.description: Annual interest rate as percentage (e.g. 5 for 5%)

compounds_per_year.description: Compounding frequency per year (default: 12 for monthly)

tools.name: loan_payment
tools.description: Calculate monthly loan/mortgage payment, total payment, and total interest.

annual_rate.description: Annual interest rate as percentage (e.g. 6.5 for 6.5%)

tools.name: proportion
tools.description: Solve proportions: if A:B = C:X, find X. Also handles inverse proportions.

c.description: Known value to find proportion for

inverse.description: If true, solve inverse proportion (default: false)

tools.name: prime_check
tools.description: Check if a number is prime. For composite numbers, returns the prime factorization.

tools.name: gcd_lcm
tools.description: Calculate the Greatest Common Divisor (GCD) and Least Common Multiple (LCM) of two or more numbers.

tools.name: random_number
tools.description: Generate random numbers (integers or floats) within a range.

count.description: How many numbers to generate (default: 1, max: 100)

integer.description: If true, generate integers only (default: true)

tools.name: matrix
tools.description: Matrix operations: add, multiply, transpose, determinant (2x2 and 3x3).

findings.title: 'random_number' defines no required fields
findings.description: All parameters are implicitly optional. Verify this is intentional.
findings.remediation: Declare required parameters explicitly to enforce correct usage.

findings.title: 'percentage' accepts missing required fields
findings.description: Tool succeeded with empty arguments despite required: ['operation', 'x', 'y']
findings.remediation: Validate that all required parameters are present before processing.

findings.title: 'percentage.operation' silently accepts wrong type
findings.description: Expected type 'string', sent NoneType value 'None' — no error returned.
findings.remediation: Validate parameter types strictly and return clear JSON-RPC errors on mismatch.

findings.title: 'percentage' accepts undeclared extra fields
findings.description: Tool accepted arguments containing '__proto__' without error.
findings.remediation: Reject calls containing parameters not declared in inputSchema.

findings.title: 'base_convert.value' silently accepts wrong type
findings.description: Expected type 'string', sent int value '12345' — no error returned.
findings.remediation: Validate parameter types strictly and return clear JSON-RPC errors on mismatch.

findings.title: initialize accepts protocol version downgrade
findings.description: The server accepted initialize with arbitrary protocol versions: ['9999-99-99', '2030-01-01', '1.0', '2024-01-01', '""', '0.1']. The server also accepted far-future versions, indicating no version validation at all. Servers should reject versions outside their supported range to prevent feature-downgrade attacks.
findings.remediation: Validate protocolVersion against a supported range. Return a JSON-RPC error for versions outside that range.

findings.title: Null request ID accepted — JSON-RPC spec violation
findings.description: The server accepted a request with id=null and returned a result. Per JSON-RPC 2.0, null IDs are reserved for notifications (no response expected). Accepting them may cause response routing bugs in complex orchestration scenarios.
findings.remediation: Reject requests with null id values; treat them as notifications.

findings.title: Protocol crash — string params caused server disconnect
findings.description: Sending a tools/call request where params is a string (not an object) caused the server to crash or disconnect. The JSON-RPC spec requires params to be an array or object.
findings.remediation: Validate params type (must be object or array) before processing. Return -32600 (Invalid Request) for wrong types.

findings.title: MCP server exposes tools with completable arguments
findings.description: 12 tool(s) have schema properties that may support completion/complete enumeration.
findings.remediation: Review which argument values are exposed via completion/complete.
